data.name: Cerulean Invasion
data.detailed_description:
Cerulean Invasion is an engaging BL / Yaoi / Gay / Bara / Queer / NSFW (18+) visual novel featuring space cadets and enticing romance. Follow our characters as they embrace their sexuality and explore their newfound romance.

SYNOPSIS

In the aftermath of the Prothinian invasion of a lunar colony, citizens are conscripted to protect mankind from the alien aggressors. Journey through the eyes of Alexis as he navigates through the ripple effects of war, forming close bonds with his comrades — Osman, Evan, and Leon — along the way. 

GAME FEATURES

  • Engaging Story: ≈75k words (approx. 6 hours of play)

  • Stunning Original Artwork: Sprite and CG art by Zinq

  • Detailed CGs: 20+ CGs (not counting variations)

  • 18+ Scenes (incl. threesome)

  • In-Game Achievements

  • And so much more!
